text:
ace or sides.
Gemini:—He will be handsome like Cupid, with a broad face
and clear speech, unsteady, either impotent or very voluptuous,
with a few children, fond of gambling and music, hater of rela-
tives, phlegmatic and windy in constitution, fond of wife, charit-
able, fond of jokes, clever, powerful and fond of eating and
drinking. He will have a prominent nose, curly hair and dark
eyes. He lives always indoors.
Cancer:—He will be intelligent, virtuous, will command his
relatives, be proud, troubled by fire and wind, talkative, of strong
body, with a few children, will have connections with many
women, be an astrologer, prompt, happy, of low income, learned,
having secret sons, knower of many languages, always in com-
pany and receiving wealth from a king.
Leo:—He will be dignified, prosperous or respectable, with
a broad face, intelligent, virtuous, enjoyer of pleasures, deceit-
ful, of charming face, merciful, fearless, getting angry for trifles
